idx_audience_blocks_profile_email_active.name: idx_audience_blocks_profile_email_active
idx_audience_blocks_profile_email_active.where: email IS NOT NULL AND unblocked_at IS NULL

audience_members_retention_idx.name: audience_members_retention_idx
audience_members_retention_idx.where: type = 'anonymous' AND email IS NULL AND phone IS NULL

content_slug_redirects_content_match.name: content_slug_redirects_content_match
content_slug_redirects_content_match.value:
(content_type::text = 'release' AND release_id IS NOT NULL AND track_id IS NULL AND release_track_id IS NULL)
        OR (content_type::text = 'track' AND track_id IS NOT NULL AND release_id IS NULL AND release_track_id IS NULL)
        OR (content_type::text = 'release_track' AND release_track_id IS NOT NULL AND release_id IS NULL AND track_id IS NULL)

idx_creator_profiles_featured_query.name: idx_creator_profiles_featured_query
idx_creator_profiles_featured_query.where: is_public = true AND is_featured = true AND marketing_opt_out = false

dm_template.name: dm_template
dm_template.default: 'Hey {displayName}! I found your Linktree and love your music on Spotify. I built Jovie to help artists like you create a better link-in-bio. Here''s your free page: {claimLink}'

notification_subscriptions_contact_requi.name: notification_subscriptions_contact_required
notification_subscriptions_contact_requi.value: "notification_subscriptions"."email" IS NOT NULL OR "notification_subscriptions"."phone" IS NOT NULL

provider_links_owner_match.name: provider_links_owner_match
provider_links_owner_match.value:
(owner_type::text = 'release' AND release_id IS NOT NULL AND track_id IS NULL AND release_track_id IS NULL)
        OR (owner_type::text = 'track' AND track_id IS NOT NULL AND release_id IS NULL AND release_track_id IS NULL)
        OR (owner_type::text = 'release_track' AND release_track_id IS NOT NULL AND release_id IS NULL AND track_id IS NULL)

smart_link_targets_owner_match.name: smart_link_targets_owner_match
smart_link_targets_owner_match.value:
(release_id IS NOT NULL AND track_id IS NULL AND release_track_id IS NULL)
        OR (track_id IS NOT NULL AND release_id IS NULL AND release_track_id IS NULL)
        OR (release_track_id IS NOT NULL AND release_id IS NULL AND track_id IS NULL)

tasks_release_idx.name: tasks_release_idx
tasks_release_idx.where: release_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
